raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/, my car was broken into and they stole my wallet with all my credit cards ( including macy 's ) and identification. Please refer to the police report : XXXX. 

Since my identification was stolen with my credit cards, they thief walked into Macys and purchased {$800.00} of stuff without my permission, which is still showing on my credit report. 

I tried to work with Macy 's by providing the police report information to them and they still kept the charges on my account and credit. I disputed this charge with XXXX 3 times and same results. Therefore, I contacted XXXX prepaid legal as this is a case of stolen identity in which I am being held legally responsible for, which is incorrect and needs to be rectify immediately. This charge is damaging my credit report and opportunities to use credit. Since Macy 's didn't believe me and continued to keep the charge on my account, I requested the credit card be closed immediately. 

I refuse to do business with any company that holds you responsible for something you didn't do. It's not good business by far. 

Identification theft is a nightmare and when you have companies like Macys who only care about the money not the customer. I prefer not to spend a XXXX investing in there company.
